template_info.name: VMware FQDN
template_info.description:
You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback/.

Note: To enable discovery of hardware sensors of VMware Hypervisors, set the macro '{$VMWARE.HV.SENSOR.DISCOVERY}' to the value 'true' on the discovered host level.

Note: To create custom performance counter see documentation: https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/7.0/manual/vm_monitoring/vmware_keys#footnotes.

Note: To get all supported counters and generate path for custom performance counter see documentation: https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/7.0/manual/appendix/items/perf_counters.

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
